languages.text: "Эоганн. Его имплант расплавился, ты носишь в себе лишь его останки. Нунциус мертв".
"Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн. Его имплант расплавился, ты носишь в себе лишь его останки. Нунциус мертв".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."
"Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."
"Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."

languages.text: «Eogunn, su implante se ha fundido. Solo lleva sus restos en su interior. Nuncius está muerto».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, su implante se ha fundido. Solo lleva sus restos en su interior. Nuncius está muerto».

languages.text: “伊奥贡。他的植入物已经熔毁了，你体内承载的不过是他残存的遗骸。努恩修斯已经不在了。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡。他的植入物已经熔毁了，你体内承载的不过是他残存的遗骸。努恩修斯已经不在了。”

languages.text: « Eogunn, son implant a fondu. Vous ne portez en vous que des morceaux de son cadavre. Nuncius est mort. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, son implant a fondu. Vous ne portez en vous que des morceaux de son cadavre. Nuncius est mort. »

languages.text: "Eogunn. İmplantı erimiş, içinde sadece onun kalıntılarını taşıyorsun. Nuncius öldü."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn. İmplantı erimiş, içinde sadece onun kalıntılarını taşıyorsun. Nuncius öldü."

languages.text: "Eogunn. Sein Implantat ist geschmolzen, Ihr tragt nur seine Überreste in Euch. Nuncius ist tot."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn. Sein Implantat ist geschmolzen, Ihr tragt nur seine Überreste in Euch. Nuncius ist tot."

languages.text: 「エオガン。彼のインプラントは溶け落ちた。君が体内に抱えているのは、彼の亡骸だけだ。ヌンキウスは死んでいる」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."

traits.locale_text: 「エオガン。彼のインプラントは溶け落ちた。君が体内に抱えているのは、彼の亡骸だけだ。ヌンキウスは死んでいる」
